description: Small bifolio. Contains notes for legal purposes. Abū l-Faraj Yeshuʿa b. ʿOvadya known as Ibn זונין (Zunayn?) acknowledges that he collected from the estate of R. Yiṣḥaq various quantities of laudanum (either 5 or 25 manns), chebulic myrobalan (5 manns), another commodity, and 24 raṭls of wax. Another entry on verso may document somebody else's acknowledgment of what they collected. The lefthand page of verso has a list of entries paired with numbers, mentioning al-Sadīd twice.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
